trigger_condition.description: Active Equity Upper Limit = 1 / (Highest Portfolio Component Weighting); apply only if result is less than Equation 8.08

sizing_rule.note: Portfolio concentration constraint derived from optimal f framework. Caps active equity at the reciprocal of largest component weight to prevent catastrophic loss concentration. Specific numerical thresholds and Equation 8.08 reference value not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Divide 1 by the highest weighting of any portfolio component and use the result as the upper limit on active equity if it is less than the answer to Equation 8.08.
